description: Short, low-pressure challenges designed to be accessible and easy to skip or modify.

challenges.title: Wall Push-Up Starter
challenges.prompt: Do 8 controlled wall push-ups. Keep your body straight and stop if anything hurts.

challenges.title: Chair Squat Ten
challenges.prompt: Do 10 slow sit-to-stands using a stable chair that cannot roll.

challenges.title: March in Place
challenges.prompt: March comfortably in place for 2 minutes while swinging your arms.

challenges.title: One-Song Dance
challenges.prompt: Dance through one favorite song in a clear, non-slippery space.

challenges.title: Balance Switch
challenges.prompt: Stand near a wall or sturdy chair and balance on each foot for 20 seconds.

challenges.title: Gentle Mobility Minute
challenges.prompt: Circle your shoulders, ankles, and wrists slowly for one minute without forcing any joint.

challenges.title: Ten Calf Raises
challenges.prompt: Hold a stable surface and complete 10 controlled calf raises.

challenges.title: Hallway Lap
challenges.prompt: Take five relaxed laps through a safe indoor route without running.

challenges.title: Invisible Jump Rope
challenges.prompt: Pretend to jump rope for 30 seconds; step side to side instead if jumping is uncomfortable.

challenges.title: Reach and Breathe
challenges.prompt: Take five slow breaths while gently reaching overhead only as far as comfortable.

challenges.title: Six-Word Story
challenges.prompt: Write a complete funny story using exactly six words.

challenges.title: Tiny Doodle
challenges.prompt: Turn a random squiggle into a recognizable character.

challenges.title: Paper Hat Prototype
challenges.prompt: Make a wearable paper hat using one sheet of paper; use only safe craft supplies.

challenges.title: Object Voice Actor
challenges.prompt: Give a nearby object a voice and perform a 20-second monologue.

challenges.title: Emoji Movie Pitch
challenges.prompt: Describe an imaginary movie using no more than six emojis, then reveal the title.

challenges.title: Wrong-Hand Signature
challenges.prompt: Write your first name three times with your non-dominant hand.

challenges.title: Three-Rhyme Sprint
challenges.prompt: Choose a word and write three clean rhymes for it in 60 seconds.

challenges.title: Mini Paper Tower
challenges.prompt: Build the tallest freestanding tower you can from three sheets of paper.

challenges.title: Sock Puppet Hello
challenges.prompt: Make a clean sock puppet and give it a ten-second introduction.

challenges.title: Mystery Sound
challenges.prompt: Create a harmless sound effect using two household objects without damaging them.

challenges.title: Specific Compliment
challenges.prompt: Give someone you know one sincere, specific compliment with no expectation in return.

challenges.title: Thank-You Text
challenges.prompt: Send a short thank-you message to someone who helped you recently.

challenges.title: Friendly Check-In
challenges.prompt: Ask a friend or relative how their day is going and listen to the answer.

challenges.title: Share a Clean Joke
challenges.prompt: Tell or text a family-friendly joke to someone who enjoys jokes.

challenges.title: Gratitude Trio
challenges.prompt: Write down three ordinary things you appreciate today.

challenges.title: Two-Minute Tidy
challenges.prompt: Set a two-minute timer and tidy only your own space.

challenges.title: Put Away Five
challenges.prompt: Return five misplaced items you own to their proper places.

challenges.title: Delete Ten Screenshots
challenges.prompt: Remove ten unneeded screenshots without deleting anything important.

challenges.title: Desk Reset
challenges.prompt: Clear one small work surface and wipe it with an appropriate cleaner.

challenges.title: Tomorrow Note
challenges.prompt: Write the single most useful thing to remember tomorrow.

challenges.title: Color Hunt
challenges.prompt: Find and photograph five different colors without photographing people or private information.

challenges.title: Cloud Character
challenges.prompt: Look at the sky from a safe place and name a shape you see in the clouds.

challenges.title: Nature Texture List
challenges.prompt: List five textures you can see outdoors without touching or removing anything.

challenges.title: Clean-Litter One
challenges.prompt: With gloves or a litter grabber, safely bin one ordinary piece of litter; skip sharp, wet, or hazardous items.

challenges.title: Window Wildlife Watch
challenges.prompt: Observe a bird or insect from a distance for one minute without feeding or disturbing it.

challenges.title: Alphabet Spotting
challenges.prompt: Find objects around you beginning with five consecutive letters.

challenges.title: Tongue-Twister Three
challenges.prompt: Say a family-friendly tongue twister correctly three times at a comfortable pace.

challenges.title: Coin Spin Practice
challenges.prompt: On a clear table, practice spinning a coin for three minutes; keep it away from small children and pets.

challenges.title: Memory Tray Five
challenges.prompt: Study five safe objects for 20 seconds, cover them, and list what you remember.

challenges.title: Paper Airplane Landing
challenges.prompt: Fold a simple paper airplane and try to land it on a clear floor target; never throw toward people or animals.

challenges.title: Robot Walk
challenges.prompt: Cross a room once using your funniest slow robot walk in a clear space.

challenges.title: News Anchor Mundane
challenges.prompt: Report a boring household event like breaking news for 20 seconds.

challenges.title: Silent Movie Face
challenges.prompt: Act out surprise, confusion, and victory using only facial expressions.

challenges.title: Backward Outfit Detail
challenges.prompt: Wear one harmless accessory backward for ten minutes if it does not block vision or movement.

challenges.title: Animal Narrator
challenges.prompt: Narrate your next simple task in a family-friendly animal voice.

challenges.title: Water Break Reminder
challenges.prompt: Refill a reusable water bottle and take a normal drink—no speed or excessive drinking.

challenges.title: Screen-Free Five
challenges.prompt: Put your device aside for five minutes and notice what is around you.

challenges.title: Slow Breathing Pause
challenges.prompt: Breathe normally and slowly for four cycles; stop if focusing on breathing feels uncomfortable.

challenges.title: Favorite Song Share
challenges.prompt: Recommend one favorite clean song to a friend without playing it loudly in public.

challenges.title: Choose-for-a-Friend Poll
challenges.prompt: Offer a friend two harmless options, like pen colors or snack flavors, and let them choose one for you.
